title: bypilot requirements.md frontmatter + sidecar JSON
description: Sprint-level user-facing requirements. One row = one acceptance contract. Written in plain Turkish by the elicitor agent, owned by the user (immutable to downstream agents). Linked to tasks via REQ-N ids. Consumed by requirements-verifier at sprint-end.

sprint.description: Sprint identifier matching the parent folder, e.g. '11' or '11-customer-attachments'.

userOriginalPrompt.description: The user's raw, unedited free-text request — preserved verbatim. Verifier uses this for intent-drift detection alongside the structured rubric below.

elicitationLenses.description: Which BMAD-inspired advanced-elicitation lenses the user picked. 'skipped' means no lens — direct extraction.

mode.description: How requirements were captured. Auto mode still requires a single user confirmation at the end (single AskUserQuestion gate).

approvedBy.description: user | auto-confirmed. Required: the elicitor cannot persist this file until the user (or in auto mode, the AI's confirmation step) approves.

id.description: Stable id within the sprint. REQ-1, REQ-2, ... Tasks reference these via linksRequirement.

description.description: One short, behavioral, Turkish sentence the user can verify by eye or by trying. Format guideline: 'Hangi yüzeyde + ne görür + ne yapar / ne olur.' Avoid jargon.

surface.description: Which user surface this lives on. Free-form but conventional: 'pilot-widget', 'chatbot-test-tab', 'customer-chat', 'dashboard-conversations', 'admin-knowledge-base', 'api-only' (for non-UI), etc.

userVisible.description: True if the user can verify this by opening the app. Drives whether vision-verify (Playwright screenshot + Sonnet vision) is required for this REQ at sprint-end.

linkedTasks.description: Task ids (from tasks.json) that contribute to this requirement. Populated by task-composer at plan time; cross-checked by verifier at sprint-end.

verificationHints.description: Optional hints from the user/elicitor on how to test: 'http://localhost:3001/chatbot → Test sekmesi → mesaj kutusunun sağında 📎 ikonu görmeli'.

status.description: Set by requirements-verifier at sprint-end. pending = not yet checked. verified = PASS. missing = FAIL. ambiguous = CONCERNS (verifier could not tell). waived = user explicitly excluded (verifier asked, user said skip).

verifierNotes.description: Verifier's one-paragraph rationale: which task addressed this, which spec covers it, what visual evidence (if vision-verify ran).

originLens.description: Which elicitation lens (if any) surfaced this requirement. Helpful for audit: 'pre-mortem detected this risk'.

ambiguityFlag.description: If the elicitor saw conflict/ambiguity in the user's prompt, this captures what the elicitor asked the user to clarify (and the resolution). Preserved for verifier context.
